hero.title: Make your customers
hero.description: Turn your product lists into modern, fast, and easy-to-share digital catalogs. Simplify the buying process for your customers and sell more professionally from any device.

features.description: A messy, poorly visualized, or hard-to-share catalog can slow decisions, create doubts, and make you lose sales against competitors with better structured presentations.
features.title: That’s where we come in.
features.subtitle: We transform traditional catalogs into strategic digital tools designed so your customers can:

items.contact: Contact you or place orders immediately

about.title: It’s not just about
about.description: It’s about selling better with less operational effort.

items.experience: A better experience for your customers.

aboutCompany.title: Commercial architecture for wholesale businesses
aboutCompany.description1: We are a team specialized in designing and developing strategic digital catalogs for companies operating in the wholesale segment.
aboutCompany.description2: Our approach starts with the business, not with design.
aboutCompany.subtitle: We understand that in wholesale, it’s not enough to simply showcase products:
aboutCompany.description3: It is necessary to structure information, simplify purchasing decisions, and optimize how customers interact with your offer.
aboutCompany.description4: That’s why we develop solutions that transform traditional catalogs into clear, functional commercial tools ready to generate results.

whyChooseUs.title: Our Approach
whyChooseUs.description: We work under a simple yet powerful logic:
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Every catalog we develop is designed to:

items.friction: Reduce friction in the purchasing process
items.integration: Integrate naturally into the daily business operation

bottom.title: We don’t design isolated pieces.
bottom.description: We design tools that are used, shared, and generate impact.

customSolution.title: Custom Commercial Architecture
customSolution.description: We design a solution fully adapted to your operation, product type, and way of selling.

items.catalog: Adapted to your catalog and operation.

methodology.title: Work methodology
methodology.description: Our process is designed to ensure clarity, efficiency, and results:

analysis.title: Business analysis
analysis.description: We understand your operation, your customer type, and your way of selling.

structure.title: Strategic structuring
structure.description: We organize your catalog with commercial logic, prioritizing clarity and ease of use.

development.title: Development and optimization
development.description: We design a functional, visually solid catalog focused on conversion.

delivery.title: Delivery ready to operate
delivery.description: You receive a tool completely ready to be implemented in your business.

bottom.title: Work methodology
bottom.description: At Byteza we are ready to help bring your ideas to life. Whether you need custom solutions or guidance for your project, our team is available to provide fast and professional support.

contact.title: Let’s talk about your digital catalog
contact.description: We are ready to help you develop a clear, functional solution ready to operate.
